vocab.meaning: ăn sâu vào cấu trúc/đời sống xã hội
vocab.example: In my country, football is so ingrained in the social fabric that the streets become deserted during major tournaments.

vocab.meaning: tình bạn thân thiết, tinh thần đồng đội
vocab.example: Team sports are favored primarily because they foster a sense of camaraderie that individual exercises simply cannot replicate.

vocab.meaning: sự nhiệt huyết/cuồng nhiệt mang tính quốc gia
vocab.example: Whenever the national team competes, the entire population is gripped by a state of intense national fervor.

vocab.word: unite people across all walks of life
vocab.ipa: /juːˈnaɪt ˈpiːpəl əˈkrɒs ɔːl wɔːks əv laɪf/
vocab.meaning: kết nối mọi người từ mọi tầng lớp xã hội
vocab.example: Basketball has a unique ability to unite people across all walks of life, transcending age and economic status.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tinh thần cạnh tranh
vocab.example: Schools prioritize volleyball to help students cultivate a competitive spirit while learning the importance of collective effort.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng, phần cực kỳ quan trọng của cái gì
vocab.example: Community-based sports clubs remain a cornerstone of local culture, providing a healthy outlet for young people.
There is a profound psychological satisfaction in achieving a collective triumph after months of rigorous team training.

vocab.meaning: cùng nhau ủng hộ/tập hợp lại để hỗ trợ
vocab.example: It is heartening to see how the whole city will rally behind the local team, regardless of their recent performance.

vocab.meaning: phổ biến ở khắp mọi nơi
vocab.example: Makeshift football pitches are ubiquitous in rural areas, showing just how deeply the sport is loved.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra những mối quan hệ gắn bó bền vững suốt đời
vocab.example: Many players find that the shared hardships of the game help them forge lifelong bonds with their teammates.
